provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes course codes, titles and curriculum groups, but not per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester study pattern. Credits and recommendedYear are therefore intentionally left unknown. The programme page confirms 121 cps for First Year Entry, 60 cps for Senior Year Entry, a 69-cp First Year Entry Major domain, a 6-cp Final Year Project domain, and a 200-hour summer internship, but those aggregates are not allocated to individual courses here.
